---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see, ideally with a sketch of the API or UI.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are the tradeoffs?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, related issues, or any other context.
